name: Sealed-Intent Multi-Agent Coordination
description: Sealed-bid commit-reveal coordination among AI agents: agents COMMIT sealed (hashed) bids for an award (a compute slot / task assignment) before a REVEAL phase, so no agent can peek at or front-run another's bid. The winning bid SETTLES atomically through the verified per-asset executor (dregg-intent::verified_settle, the Rust mirror of the Lean Ring.settleRing / SealedAuction.settle). Guarantees proved in metatheory/Dregg2/Intent/SealedAuction.lean: a commitment opens to exactly its bid (no late-switching, under collision-resistance), no reveal before the commit phase closes, a non-committed party cannot settle, and the award is atomic and value-neutral.
